channel.title: IDM Production — 12 Weeks, 12 Tracks
channel.description: A twelve-week course reverse-engineering electronic music production from Aphex Twin, Autechre, Four Tet, Squarepusher, J Dilla, DJ Shadow, DJ Premier, Kanye, Madlib, Death Grips, and Burial. Narrated by Bernd. Constraint over options. Completion over polish. Ship twelve tracks in twelve weeks.
channel.itunes:author: Zak (raindog.ai)
channel.itunes:summary: A twelve-week course reverse-engineering electronic music production from Aphex Twin, Autechre, Four Tet, Squarepusher, J Dilla, DJ Shadow, DJ Premier, Kanye, Madlib, Death Grips, and Burial. Narrated by Bernd. Constraint over options. Completion over polish. Ship twelve tracks in twelve weeks.

item.title: W1 — Listen like an engineer, subtract like a producer
item.description:
Week 1 of 12. Listen like an engineer, subtract like a producer.
Pillars: meta_listening.
Concepts covered: reference_track_analysis, critical_listening_protocol, drop_one_stem, subtraction_method_preview, time_box_45min, session_mentalities, monitoring_environment, completion_over_perfection
Deck + references: https://github.com/ZacharySBrown/idm-course/blob/main/build/html/w01-listen-subtract/index.html
item.itunes:author: Zak (raindog.ai)
item.itunes:summary: Listen like an engineer, subtract like a producer

item.title: W2 — The Subtraction method — finish by removing
item.description:
Week 2 of 12. The Subtraction method — finish by removing.
Pillars: arrangement.
Concepts covered: subtraction_method, arrangement_template, eight_bar_rule, constant_anchor, silence_as_instrument, completion_over_perfection
Deck + references: https://github.com/ZacharySBrown/idm-course/blob/main/build/html/w02-subtraction/index.html
item.itunes:author: Zak (raindog.ai)
item.itunes:summary: The Subtraction method — finish by removing

item.title: W3 — Simpler, Drum Rack, one-shots
item.description:
Week 3 of 12. Simpler, Drum Rack, one-shots.
Pillars: sound_design_primitives, ableton_core.
Concepts covered: simpler_modes, one_shot_drums, slicing_to_midi, drum_rack_chains, drum_sampler_per_pad, simpler_vs_sampler, stemforge_loader, mpc2kxl_resampling_ladder...
Deck + references: https://github.com/ZacharySBrown/idm-course/blob/main/build/html/w03-simpler-basics/index.html
item.itunes:author: Zak (raindog.ai)

item.title: W4 — Warp modes as sound design — Complex Pro, Beats, Texture
item.description:
Week 4 of 12. Warp modes as sound design — Complex Pro, Beats, Texture.
Pillars: warp, sound_design_primitives.
Concepts covered: complex_pro_formants, complex_pro_envelope, beats_mode_transient, texture_flux, repitch_chipmunk_soul, warp_marker_nudging, kick_transient_layering, phase_vocoder_dsp...
Teasers: tarbox_road
Deck + references: https://github.com/ZacharySBrown/idm-course/blob/main/build/html/w04-warp-modes/index.html
item.itunes:author: Zak (raindog.ai)
item.itunes:summary: Warp modes as sound design — Complex Pro, Beats, Texture

item.title: W5 — Aphex Pt.1 — Tuning drums to the track
item.description:
Week 5 of 12. Aphex Pt.1 — Tuning drums to the track.
Pillars: aphex_twin, microtuning.
Concepts covered: drums_as_harmonic_content, repitched_808_as_bassline, simpler_transpose_per_pad, ableton_12_tuning_systems, scala_file_loading, scale_device_midi_effect, per_step_cent_offsets, community_attribution_vs_verbatim...
Teasers: fredonia_srt
Deck + references: https://github.com/ZacharySBrown/idm-course/blob/main/build/html/w05-aphex-tuning/index.html
item.itunes:author: Zak (raindog.ai)
item.itunes:summary: Aphex Pt.1 — Tuning drums to the track

item.title: W6 — Four Tet — subliminal layering & preset discipline
item.description:
Week 6 of 12. Four Tet — subliminal layering & preset discipline.
Pillars: four_tet, layering.
Concepts covered: subliminal_layering, preset_discipline, kick_stack, midi_randomization, laptop_speaker_mixing, arrangement_primacy
Deck + references: https://github.com/ZacharySBrown/idm-course/blob/main/build/html/w06-fourtet-layering/index.html
item.itunes:author: Zak (raindog.ai)
item.itunes:summary: Four Tet — subliminal layering & preset discipline

item.title: W7 — Squarepusher — hardware hostility & Amen chopping
item.description:
Week 7 of 12. Squarepusher — hardware hostility & Amen chopping.
Pillars: squarepusher, breakbeat.
Concepts covered: hardware_first_sequencing, blind_numeric_sequencer, half_speed_tape_bass, single_pass_discipline, amen_break_chopping, slice_to_midi, sidechain_as_composition, signal_path_mental_model...
Teasers: tame_impala_boss
Deck + references: https://github.com/ZacharySBrown/idm-course/blob/main/build/html/w07-squarepusher-chops/index.html
item.itunes:author: Zak (raindog.ai)

item.title: W8 — Autechre — generative, not random
item.description:
Week 8 of 12. Autechre — generative, not random.
Pillars: autechre, generative_midi, max_for_live.
Concepts covered: procedural_composition, nested_sequencers, feedback_routing, versioning_discipline, polymeter, clip_envelope_unlinked, bounce_commit, wrongness_as_signature
Teasers: mgmt_kids_distortion
Deck + references: https://github.com/ZacharySBrown/idm-course/blob/main/build/html/w08-autechre-feedback/index.html
item.itunes:author: Zak (raindog.ai)

item.title: W9 — Vocal chopping — Prefuse, Dilla, Kanye, Premier
item.description:
Week 9 of 12. Vocal chopping — Prefuse, Dilla, Kanye, Premier.
Pillars: hip_hop_integration, vocal_processing.
Concepts covered: vocal_chopping, micro_chopping, chipmunk_soul, resample_ladder, per_pad_swing, vocal_stack_detune, self_scratched_loop
Deck + references: https://github.com/ZacharySBrown/idm-course/blob/main/build/html/w09-vocal-chopping/index.html
item.itunes:author: Zak (raindog.ai)
item.itunes:summary: Vocal chopping — Prefuse, Dilla, Kanye, Premier

item.title: W10 — Variation generation — the five mutations
item.description:
Week 10 of 12. Variation generation — the five mutations.
Pillars: arrangement, resample_and_mutate.
Concepts covered: five_mutations_method, drum_swap_mutation, bass_seed_mutation, filter_sweep_mutation, reverse_mutation, new_layer_mutation, resample_and_mutate_engine, commit_and_delete_source...
Teasers: zaireeka_4cd
Deck + references: https://github.com/ZacharySBrown/idm-course/blob/main/build/html/w10-variation-generation/index.html
item.itunes:author: Zak (raindog.ai)

item.title: W11 — Beat switches, inverse drops, and the rub
item.description:
Week 11 of 12. Beat switches, inverse drops, and the rub.
Pillars: arrangement, hip_hop_integration.
Concepts covered: tde_beat_switch, dj_dahi_reversal, the_rub_bob_power, inverse_drop, burial_archangel_method, scene_launch_switching, chain_selector_variations, follow_actions_as_switch...
Deck + references: https://github.com/ZacharySBrown/idm-course/blob/main/build/html/w11-beat-switch/index.html
item.itunes:author: Zak (raindog.ai)
item.itunes:summary: Beat switches, inverse drops, and the rub

item.title: W12 — Ship two tracks — mastering, metadata, delivery
item.description:
Week 12 of 12. Ship two tracks — mastering, metadata, delivery.
Pillars: mastering, release_discipline, voice_consistency.
Concepts covered: lufs_targets_streaming_vs_club, true_peak_ceiling_minus_one_dbtp, level_matched_ab_against_references, headphone_vs_monitor_translation, self_master_vs_send_out, distributor_choice_bandcamp_vs_distrokid, metadata_hygiene_isrc_composer_artwork, track_naming_and_versioning...
Teasers: gottinger_alumni
Deck + references: https://github.com/ZacharySBrown/idm-course/blob/main/build/html/w12-ship-two-tracks/index.html
item.itunes:author: Zak (raindog.ai)
item.itunes:summary: Ship two tracks — mastering, metadata, delivery
